goals: Configure the whale copier with appropriate risk settings (copy percentage, min/max trade limits, buy-only mode)
Start the copy trading targeting a specific whale wallet address
Check the copier status to verify it is running and monitoring
View recent trades to confirm trades are being copied successfully

user_agent_config.personality: Intermediate experience in crypto trading, prefers concise communication. Focused on risk management and profit optimization.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows how to find whale wallets via Polymarket leaderboard but does not know specific tool names; describes actions in natural language.

end_condition: User has started the copier with configured risk settings, verified it is running, and confirmed trades are being copied. Expresses satisfaction or asks no further questions about the initial setup.
